name: check_id
description: UUID uniquely identifying this welfare check

name: user_id
description: UUID of the user being checked on

name: triggered_at
description: When this welfare check was initiated

name: trigger_reason
description: What caused this check: score_threshold, manual, scheduled, no_response

name: push_sent_at
description: When a push notification was sent, if applicable

name: push_acknowledged
description: Whether the user acknowledged the push notification

name: sms_sent_at
description: When an SMS was sent, if applicable

name: sms_response
description: The user's SMS reply text, if any

name: call_initiated_at
description: When an AI phone call was initiated, if applicable

name: call_answered
description: Whether the user answered the phone call

name: call_outcome
description: Result of the call: safe, needs_help, no_answer, escalated

name: ai_transcript
description: Full transcript of the AI-conducted welfare call

name: caregiver_alerted
description: Whether the caregiver was contacted during this check

name: resolved
description: Whether the welfare check has been resolved
